subject: fix(pwa): deduplicate beforeinstallprompt diagnostic warning
body:
The warning fired twice because the hook mounts multiple times via Expo
Router layout re-mounts, each setting its own 5s timeout. Added a
module-level guard so the diagnostic only emits once per page load.

Tags: pwa, debug, mobile
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: patch

title: deduplicate beforeinstallprompt diagnostic warning
